title: ROLSON QUALITY TOOLS 5 Digit Combination High Security Padlock with Long Shackle 120mm, Black/Silver
description: High Security 5 digital combination padlock offers 100000 combinations. Secure enough to protect your property. This padlock is made from zinc alloy with durability, anti-rust, weatherproof. It is resistant to cutting and breaking. Rotary code switch makes it easy to set and reset your personal number.
